headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on Xcel Energy, Raises Price Target to $94
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $90 to $94.
